message:
🐛 Fix chunk error double-emission causing inflated runtime error counts (#2623)

tryChunkReloadRecovery() returned false when a chunk error was detected
but the reload was throttled (already reloaded within 30s). This caused
the global error handler to also emit a 'runtime' error for the same
event, inflating runtime error counts in GA4 (+400% spike).

Now always returns true when isChunkLoadMessage() matches, preventing
the caller from double-reporting the same error as both chunk_load
and runtime.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
